summary: Gruber promotes Amazon Prime Day deals through his affiliate links, highlighting significant discounts on Apple products including iPads, AirPods, and MacBooks. He frames it as a way for readers to support Daring Fireball at no extra cost to themselves. He shares personal purchase anecdotes and product recommendations, particularly endorsing AirPods 4 with ANC. The post also touches on his broader media philosophy — publishing freely without paywalls while finding alternative revenue streams like affiliate links, merch, and potentially future membership tiers.
key_points: Amazon Prime Day offers substantial Apple product discounts, with savings up to $500 on some items
Affiliate links are presented as a reader-friendly way to support independent publishing without paywalls
Gruber personally recommends AirPods 4 with ANC as surprisingly good for their price and non-sealed fit
The post reflects Gruber's commitment to keeping Daring Fireball's content free and non-paywalled, contrasting with industry trends toward subscriptions
money_quotes: You should definitely get the ones with ANC, though — I never did write a proper review, but I tested a pair with ANC for months and they're quite amazing given their price and non-sealed ear fit.
As the media industry moves more and more toward subscriptions and memberships — and, alas, paywalled content — I'm still freely publishing the entirety of my work other than Dithering.
I really do get asked by readers on a regular basis how they can support Daring Fireball directly.
We've been members since forever, and the $140/year fee pays for itself in shipping fees alone.
key_insight: Gruber uses Prime Day as both a genuine product recommendation post and an opportunity to articulate his publishing philosophy — free content supported by reader goodwill through affiliate purchases rather than paywalls.
